title: Golden Axe
description: Co-op beat-em-up — track lives and score. Highest combined score at end of game wins.

p1_lives.notes: AR: FFFE7C:03. P1 lives. Strip FF prefix for polling: 0xFE7C.

p2_lives.notes: AR: FFFE8C:03. P2 lives. Poll at 0xFE8C.

p1_magic.notes: AR: FFFE80. P1 magic pot count.

stage.notes: AR: FFFE2D stage select. Current stage indicator.

tournament_rules: Arcade survival mode — 2 players, track who survives furthest. Tiebreaker: most lives remaining at same death point. Duel mode also viable for 1v1.
sources: libretro-database/cht MD AR: FFFE7C P1 lives, FFFE7E P1 health, FFFE8C P2 lives, FFFE8E P2 health
name: Golden Axe
